title: Cuneiform Tablet #0991: Old Akkadian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
